markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Refine the Looker dashboard to prove paid search value.](https://fathom.video/share/ZX9os7ZAtaK-5LkTAQMQ5F3EZ2MkVE6y?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Goal:** Prove the new paid search campaign (launched late Sept) is additive to organic traffic, not cannibalizing it.](https://fathom.video/share/ZX9os7ZAtaK-5LkTAQMQ5F3EZ2MkVE6y?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [**Action 1:** Unify axes on click-comparison charts to show organic vs. paid clicks on a single, relative scale.](https://fathom.video/share/ZX9os7ZAtaK-5LkTAQMQ5F3EZ2MkVE6y?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [**Action 2:** Replace clicks with Click-Through Rate (CTR) on the impressions chart to show if click share is maintained as impressions grow.](https://fathom.video/share/ZX9os7ZAtaK-5LkTAQMQ5F3EZ2MkVE6y?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [**Comms:** Aida will notify Lindsay via DM when the updated dashboard is ready for review.](https://fathom.video/share/ZX9os7ZAtaK-5LkTAQMQ5F3EZ2MkVE6y?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)

## Topics

### Proving Paid Search Value

  - [**Problem:** The dashboard's dual Y-axes obscure the relative performance of paid vs. organic channels, making it difficult to prove the paid campaign's value.](https://fathom.video/share/ZX9os7ZAtaK-5LkTAQMQ5F3EZ2MkVE6y?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [**Objective:** Demonstrate that paid search spend on branded terms is additive to overall queries and clicks, not cannibalizing organic traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/ZX9os7ZAtaK-5LkTAQMQ5F3EZ2MkVE6y?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)

### Dashboard Refinements

  - [**Monthly/Weekly Click Charts**](https://fathom.video/share/ZX9os7ZAtaK-5LkTAQMQ5F3EZ2MkVE6y?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
      - [**Issue:** Dual axes prevent a direct, relative comparison of organic vs. paid clicks.](https://fathom.video/share/ZX9os7ZAtaK-5LkTAQMQ5F3EZ2MkVE6y?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
      - [**Solution:** Unify both metrics on a single Y-axis.](https://fathom.video/share/ZX9os7ZAtaK-5LkTAQMQ5F3EZ2MkVE6y?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [**Branded Impressions & Clicks Chart**](https://fathom.video/share/ZX9os7ZAtaK-5LkTAQMQ5F3EZ2MkVE6y?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
      - [**Issue:** The dual-axis view (impressions vs. clicks) is confusing because the metrics are on vastly different scales (thousands vs. tens of thousands).](https://fathom.video/share/ZX9os7ZAtaK-5LkTAQMQ5F3EZ2MkVE6y?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
      - [**Solution:** Replace clicks with Click-Through Rate (CTR) on a separate axis.](https://fathom.video/share/ZX9os7ZAtaK-5LkTAQMQ5F3EZ2MkVE6y?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
          - [**Rationale:** This directly shows if the click share is maintained as impressions increase, proving the campaign's efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/ZX9os7ZAtaK-5LkTAQMQ5F3EZ2MkVE6y?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Talal:** Implement the dashboard changes:](https://fathom.video/share/ZX9os7ZAtaK-5LkTAQMQ5F3EZ2MkVE6y?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
      - [Unify axes on monthly/weekly click charts.](https://fathom.video/share/ZX9os7ZAtaK-5LkTAQMQ5F3EZ2MkVE6y?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
      - [Replace clicks with CTR on the impressions chart.](https://fathom.video/share/ZX9os7ZAtaK-5LkTAQMQ5F3EZ2MkVE6y?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [**Aida:** Notify Lindsay via DM when the updated dashboard is ready.](https://fathom.video/share/ZX9os7ZAtaK-5LkTAQMQ5F3EZ2MkVE6y?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
